title: Unnecessary Overhaul
description: This mod overhauls the progression of Minecraft to make it more grindy.
body:
# **Unnecessary Overhaul**
This mod overhauls the progression of Minecraft to make it more grindy.
Here is a list of some features it adds.  
- 1 log can be made into 8 boards, 4 boards can be crafted into 1 planks.
- Works with all vanilla wood types including striped logs, wood and striped wood.
- Stone now drops 1-6 rocks, 4 rocks can be crafted into 1 cobblestone (also works with deepslate)
- Iron and gold ore drop 7-8 raw nuggets, 9 raw nuggets can be crafted into 1 raw ore or smelted individually.
- Copper ore drops 32-45 raw nuggets, 9 raw nuggets can be crafted into 1 raw ore or smelted individually.
- Nether quartz ore drops 7-8 quartz shards, 9 quartz shards can be crafted into 1 nether quartz.
- Diamond ore drops 1 ruff diamond, you can use 1 ruff diamond and 1 sand paper to craft a polished diamond.
- Polished diamonds can be cut in the stonecutter to make diamonds.
- Sand paper can be crafted with 1 of any kind of sand, 1 nether quartz and 1 paper.
